pojavoutlinefix.config.title: PojavOutlineFix Config
pojavoutlinefix.config.enabled.tooltip: Enable or disable the custom block outline rendering.
pojavoutlinefix.config.sideOnly.tooltip: If enabled, only the side facing you will be rendered (similar to vanilla).
pojavoutlinefix.config.fill.tooltip: Fill the surfaces of the selected block with color.
pojavoutlinefix.config.color.tooltip: The color used to fill the surfaces.
pojavoutlinefix.config.outlineColor.tool: The color used for the box outline.
pojavoutlinefix.config.thickness.tooltip: The thickness of the outline lines.
pojavoutlinefix.config.cursorSize.toolti: The length of the 3D debug crosshair lines.
pojavoutlinefix.config.cursorThickness.t: The thickness of the 3D debug crosshair lines.
pojavoutlinefix.config.slide.enabled.too: Smoothly transition the selection box between blocks.
pojavoutlinefix.config.slide.time.toolti: The duration of the animation in milliseconds.
pojavoutlinefix.config.slide.easing.tool: The easing function used for the transition animation.
pojavoutlinefix.config.debug.tooltip: Enable detailed logging. WARNING: This will impact performance! Use only for troubleshooting.
